name_cn:
Brown
Iconic Peekaboo ISeeU small handbag, full-grain leather, small size hand-stitched, classic turn-lock on both sides. Suede lining in matching color, two compartments separated by hard dividers, interior pocket with button and vintage gold metal hardware. Handbag comes with handle and adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody. Dimensions 27*9.5*21cm
Style 327
